name: Padded Princess Academy
description:
After moving out of your parents home and acheiving adulthood, instead of a normal college or university, you enrolled in the Padded Princess Academy! A college-like setting, where all students are diapered, and the guys are just as feminine and girly as the girls! Instead of math or science, your taught more feminine subjects like makeup, womens fashion, ballet, somewhat kinkier courses like Femdom 101. And on top of it all, Magic! Learning spells, Magical-girl style!

Tags: Diaper, sissy, femboy, feminization, femdom, abdl, school, girly
creator: BabyBritney
